name: UBA : Malware Activity - Registry Modified In Bulk
notes: Detects processes that modify multiple registry values in bulk within a shorter interval.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5000488) Failure Audit: A registry value was modified, (5000844) Success Audit: A registry value was modified
when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when at least 50 events are seen with the same Username, Process Name (custom) and different RegistryObject (custom), RegistryObjectName (custom) in 1 minutes
thresholds: when at least 50 events are seen with the same Username, Process Name (custom) and different RegistryObject (custom), RegistryObjectName (custom) in 1 minutes
TD_list: APPLY UBA : Malware Activity - Registry Modified In Bulk on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5000488) Failure Audit: A registry value was modified, (5000844) Success Audit: A registry value was modified
AND when an event matches all of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when at least 50 events are seen with the same Username, Process Name (custom) and different RegistryObject (custom), RegistryObjectName (custom) in 1 minutes
RED_list: Event name: UBA : Malware Activity - Registry Modified In Bulk
